summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: top schematic of a YELLOW central source sending entangled photons to a fixed BLUE filter A (θ=0°) and a rotatable GREEN filter B with angle driven by ValueTracker theta_tr. always_redraw rebuilds filter B with rotated Line axis and MathTex angle label. Bottom Axes plot of the QM disagreement-probability curve P(differ) = sin²θ (PURPLE). YELLOW always_redraw rider Dot on the curve + top-right always_redraw readout showing θ, P(match)=1-sin²θ GREEN, P(differ)=sin²θ RED. Tour 30°→45°→60°→90°→22.5°.
